title: Custom Tabs
description: Changes tabs icons in creative inventory.
body:
This pack changes tabs icons in creative menu.

That's all, yes. 
###### I'm not sure if it was made before.

Optifine gone. #noptifine

This pack may be used for your own icons, just credit me if you want to use this.

Tabs texture is compatible for 1.19.3, it may cause bugs on lower versions.

Wanted bugs.
